# kendo-themes Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-02-04

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.x (strict mode), React 18.x (functional components), Node.js v20+ + @progress/kendo-e2e (Playwright-based browser automation), @axe-core/webdriverjs (WCAG validation), ESBuild (bundling), Jest (unit tests) (001-aria-integration)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (strict mode), React 18.x (functional components), Node.js v20+: Follow standard conventions

## Recent Changes

- 001-aria-integration: Added TypeScript 5.x (strict mode), React 18.x (functional components), Node.js v20+ + @progress/kendo-e2e (Playwright-based browser automation), @axe-core/webdriverjs (WCAG validation), ESBuild (bundling), Jest (unit tests)
